hero.sub: Public hygiene, phytosanitary treatments and sanitation for businesses and institutions across Cameroon.

services.label: Our Services
services.title: Four areas of expertise for a healthy environment
services.s1_desc: Pest elimination, complete disinfection, and professional cleaning for businesses, hospitals and institutions.
services.s2_desc: Certified fumigation for international trade and agricultural crop protection.
services.s3_desc: Sanitary infrastructure and water access for businesses and rural communities.
services.s4_desc: Agricultural and environmental capacity building for NGOs and institutions.

about.label: About us
about.title:
Official approval.
Field expertise.
about.body: Since 2020, Hosamine SARL supports businesses, healthcare institutions and agricultural stakeholders across Cameroon with certified environmental solutions. Our teams operate in Douala and across the region.
about.m1_body: Rigor, responsiveness, compliance with national and international sanitary and environmental standards.
about.m2_body: Oil & gas, banking, healthcare, logistics, agro-industry, development organizations.
about.c1_desc: Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Development

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.t1_text: Partner for 3 years, fully satisfied with public hygiene, sanitation and phytosanitary services. Serious and professional.
testimonials.t2_text: Every request is handled quickly, with great attention to detail and strict compliance with hygiene and safety standards.
testimonials.t3_text: Exemplary professionalism and unwavering responsiveness for our disinfection services. We recommend Hosamine without hesitation.

cta.title:
Ready to sanitize
your environment?
cta.sub: Contact us for a free diagnosis. Our experts operate in Douala and across the Littoral region.

footer.tagline: Expert in Environmental and Agricultural Solutions
